name: Skiers' Sweet and Sour Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Round steak, cut into 1-inch cubes
1 large Green bell pepper, cut into 1-inch squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a skillet and brown the round steak.
2. Transfer the browned steak to a crock pot or large kettle.
3. Stir in tomato sauce, chili powder, paprika, brown sugar, salt, vinegar, corn syrup, carrots, onions, green pepper, and pineapple.
4. Cover and simmer for 6 hours or until the meat is tender.
5. Serve in individual bowls or hollowed-out rounds of bread.
